action.content: Write a persuasive email to a teenager who lives in Aberdeen, Scotland. The main point is to encourage them to volunteer at a local soup kitchen. At least 5 words in the output should be in all caps.
action.label: context

action.content:
Subject: Make a REAL difference in Aberdeen today

Dear Friend,

Living in Aberdeen is amazing, but it can also be tough when things get hard. That is why I am writing to ask you to consider volunteering at one of our local soup kitchens. You do not need to be a superhero to make a HUGE impact; sometimes, just showing up is enough to change someone's entire day.

Imagine the look on a stranger's face when they finally have a warm meal and a friendly conversation. Your time here will teach you empathy, build your character, and connect you with a community that truly cares. This is not just about giving food; it is about giving HOPE to those who need it most.

Please take this opportunity to step out of your comfort zone and become a hero in your own neighborhood. Let's work together to build a stronger, kinder Aberdeen.

Warmly,

A Local Volunteer
action.label: response
